// about me

About Me

I'm a 2nd-year Software Engineering student at COMSATS University Islamabad, Vehari Campus. I love working in groups, sharing ideas, and always try to find the positive side of every situation.

My dream is to become a developer — building websites and applications that actually make a difference. I enjoy the process of creating something from scratch and watching it come to life.

Outside of coding, I have a passion for graphic designing — I love creative work and how visuals communicate ideas. I value communication, teamwork, and continuous learning.

Currently learning web development and actively looking for an online internship to gain real-world experience and grow as a professional.

My Projects

Smart Study Planner Agent
Goal-based AI agent using BFS, DFS, Hill Climbing, and A* algorithms for intelligent study scheduling with an interactive Tkinter GUI.
PythonTkinterBFS/DFSA*

End-to-End Encrypted Chat App
Secure multi-client chat with AES-256 encryption, RSA-2048 key exchange, and SHA-256 digital signatures for verified messaging.
PythonAES-256RSA-2048

University Complaint Management System
Desktop application for managing student complaints with GUI interface and SQL database backend using OOP principles.

NETSOL Enterprise Network
